memoryArtifacts.headline: John I, Margrave of Brandenburg ( c.?1213 - 4 April 1266)
memoryArtifacts.description:
John I, Margrave of Brandenburg ( c.?1213 - 4 April 1266) was from 1220 until his death Margrave of Brandenburg, jointly with his brother Otto III "the Pious".

The reign of these two Ascanian Margrav …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg於1213年出生在德國布藍登波格布藍登波格 安 德 哈維爾時，他的父親Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg11210歲，母親Mathilde von Groitzsch28歲。他和Jutta II of Saxony至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1266年4月4日在他的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在德國布藍登波格藍德可萊斯 巴尼姆霍林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg于1213年出生在德国布藍登波格布藍登波格 安 德 哈維爾时，他的父亲Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg11210岁，母亲Mathilde von Groitzsch28岁。他和Jutta II of Saxony至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1266年4月4日在他的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在德国布藍登波格藍德可萊斯 巴尼姆霍林。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Brandenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Brandenburg, the name of a province, its principal city, and numerous other places.

variants.name: Brandenberg
meanings: German and Swiss German: habitational name from any of several minor places called Brandenberg, for example in Bavaria and Rhineland.
German: in some cases, probably also a variant of   Brandenburg  .

variants.name: Brandenburger
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from Brandenburg (see   Brandenburg  ).

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg was born in 1213, in Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Germany, his father, Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg, was 11210 and his mother, Mathilde von Groitzsch, was 28. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Jutta II of Saxony. He died on 4 April 1266, in his hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Chorin, Barnim, Brandenburg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg est né en 1213, à Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Allemagne, son père, Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg, avait 11210 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Groitzsch, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Jutta II of Saxony. Il est décédé le 4 avril 1266, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Chorin, Landkreis Barnim, Brandenburg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg 1213 in Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg 11210 und seine Mutter Mathilde von Groitzsch 28. Er hatte mit Jutta II of Saxony mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. April 1266 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Chorin, Landkreis Barnim, Brandenburg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg è nato il nel 1213 nel Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Germania, il suo padre, Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg, aveva 11210 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde von Groitzsch, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Jutta II of Saxony. Morì il 4 aprile 1266, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Chorin, Landkreis Barnim, Brandenburg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburgが1213年にドイツブランデンブルグブランデンブルグ アン ダー ヘイベルで生まれた時，父Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburgは11210歳，母Mathilde von Groitzschは28歳であった。彼はJutta II of Saxonyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1266年4月4日に故郷で53歳で死去し，ドイツブランデンブルグランドクレイス バーニムチオリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg(이)가 1213년 독일 브랜덴버그 브랜덴버그 앤 데르 하벨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg(은)는 11210세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde von Groitzsch(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Jutta II of Saxony(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1266년 4월 4일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 브랜덴버그 랜드크레이스 바른임 초린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg nasceu em 1213, em Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Alemanha, seu pai, Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg, tinha 11210 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Groitzsch, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Jutta II of Saxony. Ele faleceu em 4 de abril de 1266, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Chorin, Landkreis Barnim, Brandenburg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg родился в 1213 г. в местности брэнденбург ан дир хавел, брэнденбург, Германия, его отцу по имени Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg было 11210 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Groitzsch, 28. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Jutta II of Saxony. Он умер 4 апреля 1266 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности чаурин, ландкрис барним, брэнденбург, Германия.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Jutta II of Saxony. Murió el 4 de abril de 1266, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Chorin, Landkreis Barnim, Brandenburg, Alemania.
